title: type_text
description: Type plain text into the focused window or element. All characters are typed literally — no special encoding needed for spaces, punctuation, or symbols. Use send_keys / uia_send_keys for keyboard shortcuts instead.

text.description: Plain text to type. Spaces, punctuation (! @ # $ etc.) and symbols are all typed as-is. Newline characters (\n) are sent as Enter key presses.

target.description: Optional element to focus before typing.
